---
title: "Publication"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

# Publication

**Application of ARIMA and LSTM Model to the Forecast of CSI 300 Close Price**, *the 2024 3rd International Forum on Mathematical Statistics, Physical Sciences and Telecommunication System (IFMPT 2024)*

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.54097/0929np93)
